rules.justification: InternalsVisibleTo should not be used as a security feature: no warning necessary as this is always used for the test app.
InternalsVisibleTo should not be used as a security feature: no warning necessary as this is always used for the test app.
The FlowField of a table should be indexed: false positives are raised by this rule which cannot be solved.
Zero (0) Enum value should be reserved for Empty Value: disabled, not true for all functionality (AL Cops)
Public procedure requires XML documentation. (AL Cops)
